$comment: Historical schema superseded by docs/sdd/router-core/schema.json and docs/sdd/gte-hybrid-routing/spec.md
title: Skill Router — router-core contract (updated for oss-docker)
description: Typed contract for the skill-router MCP server: tool inputs/outputs (logical result payloads), config.toml, and the audit-log row. Updated for oss-docker to support customizable embedding and reranking models.

SkillId.description: Vault directory name of the skill (~/.agents/skills/<skill_id>/SKILL.md).

Sha256Hex.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the exact SKILL.md bytes.

RelativePath.description: Path of a supporting file relative to the skill directory (e.g. 'references/palette.md'). Never absolute, never contains '..'.

Candidate.description: One shortlist entry in an ambiguous result.

rerank_score.description: Reranker relevance score. null when degraded=true (reranker unreachable; FTS5-only recall).

query.description: Natural-language task description to route. Normalized (NFC) by the server; never semantically rewritten.

MatchedResult.description: AC2: one candidate clearly dominates. Full SKILL.md delivered inline, byte-identical to disk at delivery time. Never returned when degraded (AC7) — encoded as const false.

score.description: Top rerank_score. Satisfies score >= config thresholds.match_score.

margin.description: Top minus second rerank_score. Satisfies margin >= config thresholds.match_margin. Equals score when there is exactly one candidate.

body.description: Verbatim UTF-8 content of SKILL.md. sha256(body bytes) == content_sha256 == hash of the on-disk file read at delivery time.

files.description: Relative paths of the skill's supporting files (contents NOT included). Same semantics as FetchSkillResult.files.

AmbiguousResult.description: AC3: several plausible candidates; the calling LLM picks, then calls fetch_skill. No body. In degraded mode this is the only outcome besides no_match, with rerank_score null on every candidate.

NoMatchResult.description: AC4: no skill passed the relevance floor. Caller proceeds under its normal workflow; must not load an unrelated skill.

message.description: Fixed guidance string telling the caller to proceed normally.

ResolveSkillResult.description: AC1: exactly three outcomes, discriminated by 'outcome'.

FetchSkillResult.description: AC5: verbatim delivery independent of any prior resolve outcome. Unknown skill_id raises ToolError with code SKILL_NOT_FOUND instead of returning this shape.

files.description: Relative paths of supporting files under the skill directory (references/, scripts/, ...). Paths only; callers with filesystem access read contents directly.

ErrorCode.description: Machine-readable code carried in MCP ToolError messages as 'CODE: human message'.

Config.description: config.toml, validated at startup. All five tuning parameters (AC6) live here — never hardcoded. Threshold values are produced by 'skill-router eval' (AC11).

state_dir.description: All router writes are confined here (AC9): index SQLite (incl. audit log), vector matrix.

thresholds.description: Calibrated by the eval harness against the real vault; the values below are placeholders until AC11 runs.

match_score.description: T — minimum top rerank_score for outcome=matched.

match_margin.description: Δ — minimum (top − second) rerank_score gap for outcome=matched.

candidate_floor.description: Minimum score for a candidate to appear in an ambiguous shortlist; all below ⇒ no_match. Applied to rerank_score, or to normalized BM25 rank order in degraded mode.

candidate_limit.description: Maximum number of candidates returned on ambiguous outcomes (top-k limit).

embedding.description: Embeddings via OpenAI-compatible API or in-process local sentinel.

base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible embeddings base URL (client calls POST {base_url}/v1/embeddings) or 'local://' sentinel.

api_key_env.description: Name of the environment variable holding the embeddings API key. The key value itself never appears in config.

rerank.description: Reranker via Infinity-native API endpoint or in-process local sentinel.

remote_timeout_ms.description: Per-request budget for embedding and rerank calls; exceeding it flips resolve_skill to the degraded lane (AC7).

AuditRow.description: AC10: one row per resolve_skill call, appended to the audit table in the state-dir SQLite. Raw query stored deliberately (single-user private homelab).

candidates.description: skill_id + score of every reranked (or FTS5-ranked) candidate considered, best first.
